title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 417.130 - Recorder's certificate, evidence
text:
417.130.  Recorder's certificate, evidence. — It shall be the duty of each recorder of deeds within the state to keep a book in his office, in which to record the flour brands provided for in section 417.100, and a certified copy of any such record, by the recorder, shall be evidence in all courts of the making and filing and contents thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 9921) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13081; 1919 § 5727; 1909 § 6621
